headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: Gemini is rapidly pushing agentic computer control into its flagship models. Super is built specifically for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and crucially, reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly explains what Gemini is for, what changed with Gemini 3.5 Flash, and why Super is often the sharper alternative for ongoing computer-use automation.
